updates.tweet_text:
Big Picture View #ES_F: Since early May ES has formed a massive bull flag. Inside this flag, since June 15th ES has formed a smaller bull flag with 7369 support, 7472 resistance.

Plan Next Week: Fill it out to 7472, then break to 7530, dip, 7590. If 7369 fails, ES sells to 7235 https://t.co/WsjaiZM6an
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7472, 7530, 7369, 7590, 7235) are either morning-plan levels or close reaffirmations/observations; no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @LfHb4015 I forgot to put the green line, but it just maps to whats said in the text (up as long as 68 holds to flag resistance)
updates.notes: Casual reply referencing '68' (likely 7368) as already-known resistance with no explicit actionable naming language; conversational clarification, not a new level.
